chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 1766 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 7619/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 25.01.2024. Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.-.--.-.-. Mr. Ahmed Mehran Goraya Advocate, files power on behalf of respondent No.4, taken on record. Statement of respondent No.2 has been filed by learned Assistant A.G Sindh, it is also taken on record. At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of this petition filed for quashment of FIR bearing No.425/2023, for offences under sections 406, 420, 447, 511, 506/2 PPC at Police station ‘B’ Section Khairpur on the ground that since case has been challaned, he intends to file relevant application for seeking same relief before the trial Court. This petition, therefore in above terms is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
